feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Fiori Object Page Items Table - How to add totals?
entry.content:
Hello,

I created an Odata model based on a custom CDS view, my behavior is managed with unmanaged save, and in BAS i created a list report page with object page that have a table with items.
How can I display total values in that table?

Thanks,
Ines Martins

entry.title: I am not able to see a RAP service while accessing from BAS for S/4HC Customizing tenant
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am not able to see a RAP service while accessing from BAS for S/4 Hana cloud Customizing tenant but able to see for S/4 Hana cloud Development tenant.
Can anyone please help on this?

entry.title: Repeated Git Credential Prompts in Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I recently synced my CAP application with GIT (Azure DevOps). During the initial push, everything worked smoothly. However, I've noticed that with each subsequent Git operation (Pull, Push, Fetch, Commit, etc.), Business Application Studio continuously prompts me to enter my credentials.

Has anyone else encountered this issue? If you've found a solution, I'd greatly appreciate your help.

Best regards,
Rahul Jain

entry.title: Deploying a fiori application from BAS for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public system, fails
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are working on an implementation of a brand new S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition for our customer and we are facing some issues when deploying a Fiori application from Business Application Studio (accessible from BTP)

First we created a simple custom table in ADT:

Then we use the "generate ABAP repository objects" to generate fiori screen for our custom table:

All of this is fine and we get this nice looking screen: 

Then we wanted to make sure that this new fiori application has its own fiori tile and that by typing its name or some key words in the "search bar" we would be able to achieve that, something like this: 

Tried to check some tutorials and it looks like this one is the good one to follow.

Thus, we connected to Business Application Studio in BTP and starter by creating a new project from Template, then we have chosen "SAP Fiori Generator"

then we have chosen "List Report Page"

Then we filled in the Data Source, and the service generated in ADT was found with no issues.

Then we applied these configurations: 

But then when trying to deploy the application, it fails!

The full error message is the following one: 

info abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET Creating archive with UI5 build result.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET Archive created.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET Starting to deploy.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET YY1_APPRVDET found on target system: false
error abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET Request failed with status code 400
error abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET SAPUI5 application YY1_APPRVDET was not uploaded or registered successfully
error abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET SAPUI5 application YY1_APPRVDET was not uploaded or registered successfully

(the list of errors is shared in 2 captures attached to this ticket)

On the other hand when trying to preview the application from BAS, it works perfectly: 

 

Does anyone knows how to fix this please?

I have read on internet that this might need to activate "/sap/opu/odata/UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV" but in cloud public, we have no possibility to do so.

Thank you everyone

entry.title: Not getting data and 401 Unauthorize error in Mobile Service Client.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am currently working on MDK app and trying to consume OData Service in Mobile Service. I have created destination in BTP as follows:

Destination using Basic Authentication. Consuming this destination in Mobile Services as SAP Destination Service:

Able to get data on OData Application Destination Test and Launch in Browser but when I tried with application in BAS and deploy on Mobile Service not able to get data through Mobile Service Client App(SVCS) and getting 401 unauthorized error.

Kindly check on this issue and if required more information on it feel free to reach out.

Thanks,

Madhav

entry.title: Posting a clearing Document while adjusting invoice and payment in FI
entry.content: One Scenario is when we paid advance to vendor we post a debit to his ledger via f-48 and when we received a bill from him against that advance, we post a credit entry via fb60 in that ledger. which show actual debit and credit in his ledger. now when i tagging/clearing both transaction against each other sap is creating an additional entry posting in that ledger which make double debit and credit in same ledger, but in actual, I have posted single debit and credit transaction. while generating ledger of that vendor we got double of that actual debit and credit, this is wrong for both parties. this also effect in trail balance - f.08 we have to report actual debit and credit for that particular ledger, but due to clearing amount reflecting is wrong. pls provide solution for same these effects every report in sap fi.

entry.title: Consuming on-prem OData service though Destination in python script and deploy it to CF in BTP.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have developed a python script in Business Application Studio in SAP BTP and in that I am trying to consume an on premise OData service through destination.
If am giving my backend Host & port URL I am able to consume the data directly, but it would not work if I deploy it as my service is not exposed outside.
Can you please help me how to call the OData service through destination in Python Script similar to how we call in SAP UI5 applications.

Thanks & Regards,

entry.title: 415 unsupported Mediatype issue in CAP
entry.content:
UI CODE :

 

 

_genericPostUploadFile: function (url, fileData, token, that, successCallback, errorCallback) {
					const formData = new FormData();
					formData.append('file', fileData);
					jQuery.ajax({
						type: "POST",
						url: url,
						processData: false,
                        contentType: false,
						data: formData,
						beforeSend: function (xhr) {
							xhr.setRequestHeader("X-CSRF-Token", token);
						},
						success: function (result) {
							if (successCallback) {
								successCallback(that, result);
							}

						},
						error: function (e) {
							if (errorCallback) {
								errorCallback(that, e);
							}
						}
					});
			

			},

 

 
 
CAP CODE :

 

    action uploadLogFilePr()   returns String;

excel.cds​

 

excel.js

 

 this.on('uploadLogFile', async (req) => {

        const { uploadLogFile } = require('./api/excel_v2/generalFunctionsExcelPr');


        let result;
        let file;
        let parameters = {};

        file = req.data
        parameters.FILENAME = req._queryOptions.FILENAME
        parameters.USER = req._queryOptions.USER
        parameters.DATE = req._queryOptions.UPLOAD_DATE
        parameters.TYPE = req._queryOptions.TYPE


        result = await uploadLogFile(file, parameters)

        return result

    })

 

error :

 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "415",
        "message": {
            "lang": "en",
            "value": "Unsupported Media Type"
        },
        "severity": "error",
        "target": "/#TRANSIENT#",
        "innererror": {
            "errordetails": [
                {
                    "code": "415",
                    "message": {
                        "lang": "en",
                        "value": "Unsupported Media Type"
                    },
                    "severity": "error",
                    "target": "/#TRANSIENT#"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}

 

i am getting file from UI5 in formdata, as binary but CAP is throwing 415 error (unsupported mediatype) how to fix this issues @gregorw @SAPSupport

I also used Multer but it didnt worked for me

entry.title: SAP Business Application Studio doesn't connect to our On-Premise System / AxiosError 403
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Unfortunately I cannot select the services from our SAP system and get the error:

Authentication incorrect AxiosError: Request failed with status code 403

Everything is already configured in the Cloud Connector and in the BTP and most of it seems to be correct

The communicationchek in the BTP is successful

The SAP Cloud Connector also works and seems to be set up correctly for me:

Once the settings for the Cloud To On-Premise configuration

entry.title: How to change FIORI App Deploy Task Language in BAS
entry.content: I am getting deploy task (with command - npm run deploy) output in language other than English, kindly guide me to change it to English Language

entry.title: KPIs Not Displaying in List Report Application- Analytical Table view
entry.content:
Hello,
         I have created list report application with Analytics table where I have added the charts and Visual Filters.  But, When I add KPI's in the same project I don't see that on the UI as well after inspecting I don't get any errors. For reference here- I have attached the screenshot of Manifest.json file (Where I have included the kpi qualifier) as well included my annotation file of my List report page. Looking at the file can anyone notice on where am I going wrong?
Thank you,
Prasad.

entry.title: How Can I Fix the "Active Entities Cannot Be Modified via Draft Request" Error in SAP CAP?
entry.content:
Hello,

This are my 2 entities with draft enabled and associated to each other

 

.draft.enabled
@odata.draft.bypass
entity PO_Extraction : managed {
  key ID                  : UUID @(Core.Computed : true);
  PO_Number               : String(50);
  PO_creation_date        : Date;
  Status                  : String(30);
  Delivery_date           : Date;
  Billed_to               : String(100);
  Vendor                  : String(100);
  Delivery_address         : String(200);
  Total                   : Integer;
  // Association to Line_Items
  line_items              : Association to many Line_Items
    on line_items.PO_extraction_ID = $self.ID; 
  Masterdata: Association to Master_Data; 
}
@odata.draft.enabled
@odata.draft.bypass
entity Line_Items : managed {
  key lid          : UUID @(Core.Computed : true);
  Item                    : String(100);
  Unit                    : String(30);
  Quantity                : Integer;
  Unit_price              : Integer;
  Sub_total               : Integer;
  PO_extraction_ID        : String;
  // Association back to PO_Extraction
  po_extraction           : Association to PO_Extraction on po_extraction.ID=PO_extraction_ID;
  
}

 

I have created a list report application with main entity as "PO_Extraction" and Navigation entity as "Line_Items". Now, on the Object page of PO_Extraction I have added a table section so that while creating a PO_Extraction entity user should be able to add the line_Items as well. But when I click on create button of "Line_Items" entity I get the error as "Active entities cannot be modified via draft request" Does anyone have solution on how to handle this?

entry.title: Getting 502 error on SAP MDK Web Application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on MDK application in CF environment (in Business application Studio) and try to run it on Local Dev Space and also deployed on Cloud foundry and getting 502 Bad Gateway in Local Dev space and 500 Internal Server Error in Cloud foundry.

entry.title: SAP fiori connecting to fastapi
entry.content:
I have developed a SAP Fiori application in SAP Business Application Studio and initialized the FastAPI web framework within my project. However, while attempting to run the SAP Fiori UI app, I am encountering issues retrieving results.
AJAX request is not happening, it is not bale to connect
@sap Please can you guide me on how to resolve this and ensure seamless integration between the FastAPI backend and the SAP Fiori front-end.

entry.title: Can't open Template Wizard
entry.content:
Hi There,

I setup a web client plugin on VS code follow this document Installing Visual Studio Code Plugin for Web Client

Every steps is fine.

But it pop up this error message, when I perform "Open Template Wizard" command

Any suggestion?

entry.title: CAP UI not loading when opening from SAP Build WorkZone
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I have a cap application and UI application(built using annotation) deployed into SAP Build WorkZone.

Below is my UI application(highlighted in green - nsinvoiceui) visible in HTML5 Application section and it is loading properly when I open it from HTML5 Applications section.

However, the same application is not loading when I'm opening it from Build WorkZone. It stays in the below page.

When I checked in the developer tools, below is the error it was showing "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'message')" when loading ShellServices.

Note: This application was working fine yesterday(10-04-2024), surprisingly not today.

since the error is from standard library, I don't know What am I missing here.

I tried updating the Build workzone content, cleared cache and reopening the application. it didn't help me resolve.

Help me to resolve this issue.

Thanks in Advance!!

Best Regards

Boopalan M

SAP Business Application Studio 

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment 

HTML5 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model  #flexible programming model-UI5

entry.title: "This application uses '@sap/cds' version 6.8, which is not compatible with the installed '@sap/cds-
entry.content:
Hi Experts , 

I am trying to run the CAPM applications from BAS to perform the changes and check it locally , but when click on run configuration and create run configuration I am not getting the child nodes to bind destination, xsuaa, and HANA DB.

Getting only play button next to run configuration instance ,if i click on that below error is coming. Please let me know if anyone faced same issue.Thanks 

This application uses '@sap/cds' version 6.8, which is not compatible with the installed '@sap/cds-dk' version 8

 

Thanks

Muraleedhar K

entry.title: Cloud foundry sign in is always asking for SSO passcode
entry.content:
Cloud Foundry sign in for Business Application studio is asking for SSO auth code for which a temporary pass code can be generated and given. 

Is there a way we can bypass it? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
